name: Low-Cal Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Granulated fructose or other sugar replacement
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 13 x 9-inch cake pan.
3. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl and beat just until blended.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 40-45 minutes.
5. Let cool.
Recipe yields 24 servings at 86 calories per serving. Exchanges: 1/2 bread, 1 fat. From Diabetic Dessert Cookbook. Reposted with permission from Nancy O'brion via Meal-Master.
